message:
feat(fcp-host): typed enforcement config with canonical ID validation and wildcard support

Replace String-keyed zone/connector/operation maps in EnforcementConfig
with typed ZoneId, AllowedConnector, and AllowedOperation wrappers:

- AllowedConnector::Any matches all connectors (wildcard "*");
  AllowedConnector::Connector(ConnectorId) matches exact IDs.
- AllowedOperation follows the same pattern.
- add_zone_membership/connector/operation now return Result with
  EnforcementConfigError for invalid zone/connector/operation strings.

Enforcement checks now parse context strings into typed IDs at check
time, returning INVALID_ZONE_ID / INVALID_CONNECTOR_ID /
INVALID_OPERATION_ID deny outcomes for non-canonical values:
- CanonicalDecodeCheck validates connector_id, operation, zone_id.
- ZoneMembershipCheck, PolicyCeilingCheck parse before lookup.
- Helper functions parse_zone_id_for_check, parse_connector_id_for_check,
  parse_operation_id_for_check.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
